solar_panel.note: Output varies by time of day — peaks around midday, zero at night

grid_import.note: Varies by time — higher in morning/evening, lower overnight

battery_storage.note: Starts at 50% charge. Charges when solar is high, discharges when demand is high.

ev_charger.note: Either on (7.4kW) or off (0kW). Typically active in evenings.

temperature.note: Ambient temperature around 20C with some variation throughout the day
